narrative:
Cols 75-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,368 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.5 percentage points.
